verdict: An exceptionally well-crafted chart for a 122 BPM remix of 'Mirrors', featuring flawless sync, outstanding physical flow, and perfect energy-to-density scaling.

issues.problem: While holding U, the player must hit R and D in rapid succession (16th-note speed). This forces a very fast one-foot double-step (jack) or an awkward crossover, causing a minor spike in difficulty compared to the rest of the chart's smooth flow.
